title: Reading and Use of English - Part 7
description: You are going to read an article about four people who discuss climate change and weather. For questions 43–52, choose from the people (A–D). The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.C:
### Hannah, 29, Meteorologist
[43]I study weather patterns for a living, so I'm very aware of climate change.[/43] [44]It's worrying to see how quickly things are changing.[/44] [45]I try to educate others about the importance of protecting the environment.[/45]
texts.B:
### Diego, 34, Farmer
[46]Changes in the weather have made farming more difficult.[/46] [47]We have to adapt our methods to cope with unpredictable seasons.[/47] [48]I worry about the future of agriculture.[/48]
texts.D:
### Lucy, 23, Student
[49]I try to reduce my carbon footprint by cycling and recycling.[/49] [50]I think everyone should do their part to help the planet.[/50] [51]Sometimes, I feel frustrated when others don't care.[/51]
texts.A:
### Paul, 41, Tour Guide
[52]Tourism is affected by extreme weather events.[/52] [43]I've noticed more storms and heatwaves in recent years.[/43] [44]We have to change our plans more often now.[/44]

questions.question: has noticed an increase in extreme weather events?
questions.explanation: Paul has noticed more storms and heatwaves in recent years.

questions.question: finds it worrying how quickly the climate is changing?
questions.explanation: Hannah finds it worrying to see how quickly things are changing.

questions.question: tries to educate others about environmental protection?
questions.explanation: Hannah tries to educate others about protecting the environment.

questions.question: finds farming more difficult due to weather changes?
questions.explanation: Diego finds farming more difficult because of changes in the weather.

questions.question: has adapted farming methods to cope with unpredictable seasons?
questions.explanation: Diego has to adapt methods to cope with unpredictable seasons.

questions.question: is concerned about the future of agriculture?
questions.explanation: Diego worries about the future of agriculture.

questions.question: tries to reduce their carbon footprint?
questions.explanation: Lucy tries to reduce her carbon footprint by cycling and recycling.

questions.question: believes everyone should help the planet?
questions.explanation: Lucy thinks everyone should do their part to help the planet.

questions.question: feels frustrated when others don't care about the environment?
questions.explanation: Lucy feels frustrated when others don't care.

questions.question: works in tourism and is affected by extreme weather?
questions.explanation: Paul works as a tour guide and says tourism is affected by extreme weather events.
